# Qeyafa - AI-Powered Custom Tailoring

> Qeyafa is an innovative Saudi tech platform transforming fashion with AI-powered 3D body measurements from 2D photos, achieving 95% accuracy.

## About

Qeyafa merges traditional tailoring craftsmanship with cutting-edge Computer Vision and AI technology. Our platform connects customers, tailors, and fabric suppliers in one integrated ecosystem.

## Services

- **Individual Tailoring**: AI body scanning for perfectly fitted custom garments
- **Corporate Solutions (B2B)**: Automated uniform management with remote AI measurement
- **Partner Hub**: Network of skilled tailors receiving ready-to-sew orders
- **Supplier Hub**: Digital fabric marketplace connecting suppliers with tailors and customers

## Technology

- Proprietary Computer Vision engine converts 2D photos into 3D parametric body models
- 95% measurement accuracy from just 2 photos
- 20+ precise measurement points
- On-device processing for privacy and security

## Links

- Website: https://qeyafa.com

## Languages

Available in English and Arabic (العربية)

## Location

Saudi Arabia
